heading: Biomedical research fellowships
label: 40503 Biomedical research fellowships
text: The Administrator and the Director of the National Institutes of Health shall create a joint program of graduate research fellowships in biomedical research described in . Fellowships under such program may provide for participation in approved research conferences and symposia.section 40501(a) of this title
